message:
fix(digest-auth): prevent substring matches in parameter extraction

Fixes bug where param("name") would incorrectly match inside "username":

Before: param("name") on "username=alice" returned "alice"
After: param("name") returns None (no word boundary match)

Changes to DigestAuth::param():
- Check that key match occurs at word boundary
- Valid boundaries: start of string, after comma, after whitespace
- Loop through all occurrences to find proper boundary match

Security implication:
- Attacker could craft credentials with ambiguous parameters
- Example: "xuri=/admin" would match param("uri") incorrectly
- Now only matches "uri=/admin" (after comma boundary)

Adds regression test for substring non-matching behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
